rationale: Re-assert every ensures-conjunct for both runs so the disjoint triggers on `threads_unchanged_except`, `process_tree_unchanged`, `containers_tree_unchanged`, `process_mem_unchanged` and `page_closure` line up; replace the previous attempt's invalid `(set![] as Set<ThreadPtr>)` cast (which tripped the type-checker because `as` is for integer coercions and `Set` isn't `Copy`) with a typed `let empty_threads: Set<ThreadPtr> = Set::empty();` binding, then use `=~=` (set/seq extensionality) and a pointwise `assert forall` to lift the per-thread/per-process/per-container/per-page equalities to whole-state equality between `post1_self_` and `post2_self_`, which pins `r1.0 == r2.0` via the page_closure-remove ensures.
